## The problem

<!-- A concrete situation where the tool didn't do what you needed. A real
     Weebly site, a real command, a real outcome. Not "it would be nice
     if…" — what got in your way? -->

## What you'd want instead

<!-- The behavior change. A new flag, a different heuristic, a different
     default. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you work around it manually? Is there an existing flag that almost
     does it? -->

## Scope check

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for what fits. New top-level commands and runtime
     dependencies are usually discussed before any PR. -->
